title: About
description: Learn about Atlantis Dental Society and our mission to support pre-dental students.

hero.headline: About Atlantis Dental Society
hero.subheadline: A student-led organization committed to supporting the next generation of dental professionals. We exist to help pre-dental students access the guidance, opportunities, and community they need to move forward with confidence.

sections.heading: Who We Are
sections.body: Atlantis Dental Society was founded from a simple but important realization: many students interested in dentistry receive different advice from different people. Information often comes from family, friends, community members, dental students, and others, but it can feel scattered, inconsistent, and confusing. ADS was created to bring that information together in one place and to support students who feel uncertain about how to move forward. We are a student-led society built to make the pre-dental journey more clear, connected, and accessible for those who are serious about becoming dentists.

sections.heading: What We Are Trying to Achieve
sections.body: Our goal is to help anyone who truly wants to become a dentist navigate the path to dental school with greater clarity, confidence, and support. We aim to reduce confusion, expand access to reliable guidance, and create opportunities that help students grow academically, professionally, and personally. By offering resources, mentorship, exposure, and community, ADS works to make the path to dentistry more informed, more achievable, and less overwhelming.

sections.heading: Where We Are Active
sections.body: Atlantis Dental Society is active across several areas of the pre-dental journey, supporting students through guidance, development, and community.

items.title: Academic & Admissions Guidance
items.description: Helping students plan their academic path and navigate dental school applications.

items.title: DAT Resources
items.description: Providing study materials and strategies for the Dental Admission Test.

items.title: Mentorship & Peer Advising
items.description: Connecting students with mentors who understand the pre-dental experience.

items.title: Professional Development
items.description: Events and workshops designed to build skills and professional readiness.

items.title: Networking Opportunities
items.description: Creating connections between students and dental professionals.

items.title: Clinical Exposure
items.description: Expanding opportunities for students to gain hands-on experience in the field.

sections.heading: Who We Work With
sections.body: ADS collaborates with professionals and organizations that help broaden the pre-dental experience. Exposure to the field before dental school helps students better understand the profession and build stronger applications.

items.title: Dentists & Clinics
items.description: Partnering with practicing professionals for mentorship and learning.

items.title: Dental Laboratories
items.description: Connecting students with the technical side of dentistry.

items.title: Event Planners & Advisors
items.description: Collaborating on events that enrich the student experience.

items.title: Organizations & Partners
items.description: Working with groups that share a commitment to education and student growth.
